=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Ruth Eckerd Hall
Clearwater, Florida
11 November 1992

Title:  "Watching The River Flow"
 
 
 1.  Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35
 2.  I Dreamed I Saw St. Augustine
 3.  All Along The Watchtower
 4.  Positively 4th Street
 5.  Disease Of Conceit
 6.  Drifter's Escape
 7.  Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter)
 8.  Mama, You Been On My Mind
 9.  Boots Of Spanish Leather



10.  The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll
11.  Girl From The North Country
12.  Everything Is Broken
13.  Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power)
14.  When I Paint My Masterpiece
15.  Maggie's Farm
16.  Shooting Star
17.  Highway 61 Revisited
18.  Blowin' In The Wind
 
 
Concert # 453 of The Never-Ending Tour.  Concert # 17 of the 1992 US Fall Tour. 1992 concert # 89.
 
Concert # 22 with the 8th Never-Ending Tour band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), John Jackson (guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), Ian Wallace (drums), Winston Watson (drums & percussion).
 
8-9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
 
10  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal), John Jackson (guitar) & Tony Garnier (bass).
 
11  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal), John Jackson (guitar), Bucky Baxter (electric mandolin) & Tony Garnier (bass).
 
1, 3, 5, 8-11, 14, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.
 
12, 17  Derek Trucks (electric slide guitar).
 
Note. Derek Trucks is the 12 year old son of Bruce Trucks in The Allman Brothers Band.
 
11 new songs (61%) compared to previous concert. 5 new song for this tour.
